creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: makc
Date: Sun Dec 22 14:33:44 2013
New Revision: 337192
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/337192

Log:
  - Update to 1.19.1
  - Use autoplist
  - Remove NO_STAGE
  
  PR:		ports/184371
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (3 weeks)

Deleted:
  head/science/veusz/pkg-plist
Modified:
  head/science/veusz/Makefile
  head/science/veusz/distinfo

Modified: head/science/veusz/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/science/veusz/Makefile	Sun Dec 22 14:29:39 2013	(r337191)
+++ head/science/veusz/Makefile	Sun Dec 22 14:33:44 2013	(r337192)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	veusz
-PORTVERSION=	1.17.1
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.19.1
 CATEGORIES=	science kde
 MASTER_SITES=	http://download.gna.org/veusz/
 
@@ -15,13 +14,12 @@ LICENSE=	GPLv2
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYNUMPY} \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}qt4-gui>=0:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/py-qt4-gui \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}qt4-svg>0:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/py-qt4-svg
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	${RUN_DEPENDS}
+BUILD_DEPENDS:=	${RUN_DEPENDS}
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
-INSTALLS_EGGINFO=	yes
+PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} \

Modified: head/science/veusz/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/science/veusz/distinfo	Sun Dec 22 14:29:39 2013	(r337191)
+++ head/science/veusz/distinfo	Sun Dec 22 14:33:44 2013	(r337192)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (veusz-1.17.1.tar.gz) = 81511fc9deebb8f786a667b4a9d849348e8685d767cf823f8291b625c113afd0
-SIZE (veusz-1.17.1.tar.gz) = 1718565
+SHA256 (veusz-1.19.1.tar.gz) = d6e2d530a18d8c1546be112e95b0fb649a213d559ba2d467810ab6c19adb52b0
+SIZE (veusz-1.19.1.tar.gz) = 1777351
